pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly injects history entries containing these names and writes them to recent_families.txt.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which injects these exact personal domains into the Chrome Bookmarks JSON.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which creates arrangement_browser_spec.txt specifying these exact four folders for bookmark organization.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which specifies /home/ga/Documents/Arrangement_Files as the required download location.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which specifies 'obit' as the required search engine shortcut keyword.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated Chrome browser history, bookmarks, and configuration text files created via setup_task.sh. I have confirmed that the target sensitive family names for history deletion are Patterson, Smith, Hernandez, and O'Connor. The personal bookmarks to delete include Netflix, Amazon, Facebook, DraftKings, and Reddit. The four expected professional bookmark folders are Merchandise, Cemeteries, Florists, and Vital Statistics. The required download directory is Arrangement_Files, and the target custom search engine keyword is 'obit'.
